name: Jiangsu Aoyang Health Industry Co.ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Aoyang Health Industry Co.ltd. produces and sells chemical fibers in China and internationally. It offers various functional fibers, such as black and flame-retardant fibers, and long bundle wire, as well as conventional viscose fibers. The company also operates hospitals, rehabilitation centers, and pharmaceutical retail chains. In addition, it offers health management, pharmaceutical logistics, and teleconsultation services, as well as distributes pharmaceutical products. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Aoyang Technology Corporation Limited. and changed its name to Jiangsu Aoyang Health Industry Co.ltd. in September 2018. Jiangsu Aoyang Health Industry Co.ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Zhangjiagang, China.
